---
title: "Copernicus Climate Data Explorer"
description: "Interactive exploration of ERA5 reanalysis and CMIP6 climate model data for environmental research."
date: "2024-12-01"
image: thumbnail.jpg
categories: [App, Shiny, Climate Data]
---

## About

A Shiny app for browsing and comparing Copernicus climate data: **ERA5** reanalysis
(the observed past climate) and **CMIP6** model projections (possible futures). Pick a
region and time period and explore climate variables interactively — reanalysis against
projections — without writing any code.

## Live Demo

```{=html}
<iframe src="https://anayananayana.shinyapps.io/ERA5_CMIP6_sample/"
        width="100%" height="650" style="border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:8px;">
</iframe>
```

[Open app in new tab](https://anayananayana.shinyapps.io/ERA5_CMIP6_sample/){.btn .btn-primary}

## Stack

[R]{.badge-skill} [Shiny]{.badge-skill} [Climate Data]{.badge-skill} [ERA5]{.badge-skill} [CMIP6]{.badge-skill}
